## OpenTicket Plugin Submission

Thank you for contributing to the OpenTicket Plugin Registry! Please ensure your pull request adheres to the following checklist before submitting.

### 📋 Checklist

- [ ] I have read the submission guidelines in the `README.md`.
- [ ] My plugin definition has been added to `registry.json`.
- [ ] My plugin's `id` is globally unique and formatted in `kebab-case`.
- [ ] I have included the correct `configSchema` detailing all required environment variables.
- [ ] I have verified the JSON syntax is valid and adheres to `schema.json`.
- [ ] I have tested my plugin against the latest version of the OpenTicket Hook Engine.

### 📝 Plugin Summary
*   **Plugin Name:** 
*   **Purpose:**
*   **Related Issues (if any):**

### 🔒 Security Acknowledgement
- [ ] I confirm that this plugin does not execute malicious code or expose sensitive platform state inadvertently.
